rules.rule: Flag changes that may mis-detect NGINX versions, install incompatible artifacts, or make rollback/troubleshooting harder.

Shell scripts should remain macOS bash 3.2 compatible, include default case branches, route diagnostics to stderr, avoid GNU/PCRE-only assumptions, and keep usage text synchronized with parsed flags/defaults.
Checks documented as required must affect pass/fail outcome; avoid INFO-only paths for mandatory assertions in e2e or release-gate tooling.
Python harnesses should validate binary executability (not only path existence) and fail non-zero when required runtime checks fail.
Flag changes that may break release matrix completeness, artifact naming consistency, or release gate assumptions/docs synchronization.
